name: Fresh Tomato Salsa (Salsa De Jitomate Cruda)
recipeIngredient: 3 to 6 serrano chilies OR 2 jalapenos, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the tomatoes and white onion.
2. Finely chop the green onions.
3. Finely chop the cilantro.
4. If using serrano chilies, mince 3 to 6; if using jalapenos, mince 2.
5. Combine all ingredients except avocado in a bowl.
6. Add salt to taste.
7. Stir in the grapefruit or lime juice.
8. Crumble the oregano into the mixture.
9. Fold in the chopped cilantro.
10. Just before serving, gently fold in the diced avocado.
